metadata.title: La Quebrada Viva — extended AOI bbox (covers Wesley's polygon, post-escritura correction)
metadata.notes: Extends original aoi_62ha.geojson (north edge -25.615) by 2.2 km northward to -25.595, so the bbox actually CONTAINS Wesley's hand-drawn polygon (polygon north edge -25.60506). The original AOI bbox cut off ~364 m of the actual parcel — every DEM, Sentinel-2 fetch, and GEDI search done against the old bbox needs to be re-run if the buildable northern cluster is in scope. East/west/south edges unchanged.
metadata.supersedes: aoi_62ha.geojson (kept for byte-identity of frozen escritura deliverables at commit 85e86aa)
